elements.text: You're going on a long car ride with your family to visit family in another part of the state. After an hour, you notice your phone battery is almost dead and you don't have a charger. You think about the rest of the car ride and feel like you will be...

elements.name: running_low_on_battery--family_&_home_life--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
